description: Business letter, fragment, from Abū Naṣr b. Ibrāhīm, in Alexandria, to Ḥalfon b. Netanel, in Fustat. Ending only. Dating: Early 1130s CE. The letter includes information on trade in wheat. This is one of the earliest letters of Abū Naṣr to Ḥalfon: from the contents of the letter he appears inexperienced and Ḥalfon serves as his instructor and patron. (Information from Frenkel)
tags: trade, Abu Nasr b. Ibrahim, wheat, Halfon b. Netanel
